overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game showing a character in a futuristic suit exploring dark industrial corridors and rooms of a spaceship or station. The character interacts with workbenches, checks a wrist-mounted device, searches lockers, and explores an office area in a high-fidelity game engine environment with atmospheric green and red lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with metal walkways

events.description: character enters workshop area from the industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow industrial corridor toward workshop entrance, passing mesh gates and warning stripes

entered.detail: large industrial metal doorway with riveted frame marking entrance to area
diagonal yellow and black hazard stripes painted on wall edges
metal mesh security gate with blue lighting behind it
opening leading to workshop area with visible equipment inside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with metal grating floors and warning stripes on the walls. The camera follows from behind as the character passes a mesh gate and approaches the entrance to a workshop area with red emergency lighting visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance workshop with workbench and tools

events.description: character picks up glowing blue datapad from workbench
character raises wrist to check holographic device display

agents.ego_description: examining items on workbench, picking up glowing object, and checking wrist-mounted device for data

entered.detail: cluttered work surface with tools, spray cans, and electronic components
wall-mounted yellow plastic bins for small parts storage
small electronic device emitting bright blue light on the workbench
holographic display device mounted on character's wrist showing data interface

segments.scene_description: Inside the workshop, the character approaches a cluttered workbench with yellow storage bins on the wall. The character picks up a glowing blue datapad from the table and checks a wrist-mounted device that projects a holographic interface displaying data and a warning symbol.

scene_state.functional_zone: equipment storage corridor with shelving units

events.description: exits workshop into storage corridor with yellow equipment bags

agents.ego_description: walking through storage area with metal shelving and yellow equipment bags on right side

entered.detail: tall metal racks holding equipment and storage containers
bright yellow duffel bags and cases stacked on shelving
doorway leading to locker room area with metal lockers visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character exits the workshop and walks through a storage corridor lined with metal shelving units holding yellow equipment bags. The environment is dimly lit with overhead industrial lights as the character approaches a locker room entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: locker room with metal storage lockers

events.description: character opens locker L-02 and examines contents inside
character opens locker L-03 which has a green status light

agents.ego_description: searching through metal lockers, opening L-02 and L-03 to look for items

entered.detail: row of dark metal lockers with identification labels L-02 and L-03
metal mesh wall dividing the locker area
white towel hanging on a hook between lockers
small green LED light indicating locker status above L-03

segments.scene_description: Inside the locker room, the character approaches a row of metal lockers labeled L-02 and L-03. The character opens locker L-02 to examine the contents, then opens locker L-03 which has a green status light, searching for useful items in the dimly lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: office space with desk and computer workstation

events.description: enters office area from storage corridor through dark doorway
character approaches desk to examine papers and computer

agents.ego_description: entering office area and approaching the desk to search for documents or data

entered.detail: large black desk with papers, books, and electronic equipment on surface
monitor on desk displaying data or turned off
illuminated desk lamp providing focused light on the work surface
tall shelves filled with books, binders, and boxes against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the locker room and enters a dimly lit office space through a dark corridor. The character approaches a large desk with an illuminated desk lamp, computer monitor, and scattered papers, with bookshelves visible against the wall, suggesting an administrative or control room within the industrial facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of industrial spaces that transition from narrow corridors into a cluttered workshop and finally into a quiet administrative office. It begins by following the character through a narrow corridor with metal grating floors and warning stripes, moving past a mesh gate toward the red emergency glow of a workshop. As the character enters the workshop to retrieve a glowing blue datapad and activate a holographic wrist interface, the scene then shifts back into a dimly lit storage corridor lined with yellow equipment bags. The camera continues through a locker room where the character examines metal lockers with green status lights before turning toward a dark corridor that opens into a dimly lit office. The movement finally concludes at a large desk illuminated by a lamp and computer monitor, surrounded by bookshelves and scattered papers.
